other_observers: VENT tour group; Marshall Iliff found the bird
description: A small flycatcher, slightly smaller than SAPH. Brownish gray above and paler below with a distinct pinnkish wash on the flanks and lower belly. some faint streaking on the sides and breast.Behaviors: Sitting on a fence and occasionally a tree. It made occasional sallies out to catch bugs.Call: none notedPlumage: adult female
